title: Expected an interface scope name to have at least one dot
body:
I don't understand what the problem is but it is the same as https://github.com/verilator/verilator/issues/5237


```
%Error: Internal Error: /home/kreijstal/git/risc-v-lab/src/fv/system_tb.sv:76:15: ../V3TraceDecl.cpp:439: Expected an interface scope name to have at least one dot
                                                                                : ... note: In instance 'jtag_master::__VDynScope_76'
   76 |   jtag_master jtag ();
      |               ^~~~
```


```
kreijstal@kreijstalnuc:~/git/risc-v-lab$ verilator --version
perl: warning: Setting locale failed.
perl: warning: Please check that your locale settings:
	LANGUAGE = (unset),
	LC_ALL = (unset),
	LC_CTYPE = "en_GB.UTF-8",
	LC_NUMERIC = (unset),
	LC_COLLATE = (unset),
	LC_TIME = (unset),
	LC_MESSAGES = (unset),
	LC_MONETARY = (unset),
	LC_ADDRESS = (unset),
	LC_IDENTIFICATION = (unset),
	LC_MEASUREMENT = (unset),
	LC_PAPER = (unset),
	LC_TELEPHONE = (unset),
	LC_NAME = (unset),
	LANG = "de_DE.UTF-8"
    are supported and installed on your system.
perl: warning: Falling back to a fallback locale ("de_DE.UTF-8").
Verilator 5.034 2025-02-24 rev v5.034
kreijstal@kreijstalnuc:~/git/risc-v-lab$ uname -a
Linux kreijstalnuc 6.8.0-53-generic #55-Ubuntu SMP PREEMPT_DYNAMIC Fri Jan 17 15:37:52 UTC 2025 x86_64 GNU/Linux
``` 

I can give an even bigger example if that is helpful but questasim and vivado seem to have no problem with this.
